name: whatsapp
description: Send WhatsApp messages and manage your business profile and message templates via the WhatsApp Business Cloud API

requiredApis.name: Meta app with the WhatsApp product

envVars.name: WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN
envVars.description: Meta access token with whatsapp_business_messaging and whatsapp_business_management permissions (use a System User token in production)

envVars.name: WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID
envVars.description: Phone number ID of the business phone number (from WhatsApp > API Setup in the Meta app dashboard); pass it as the phoneNumberId parameter of messaging tools

envVars.name: WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID
envVars.description: WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) ID, needed to list message templates; pass it as the wabaId parameter

tools.name: Send Text Message
tools.description: Send a free-form text message to a WhatsApp user (only within 24 hours of their last message; otherwise use a template)

phoneNumberId.description: Business phone number ID (the WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID value, not the phone number itself)

to.description: Recipient phone number in international format, e.g. +16505551234

tools.name: Send Template Message
tools.description: Send an approved message template to a WhatsApp user; required to start conversations outside the 24-hour customer service window

phoneNumberId.description: Business phone number ID (the WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID value)

to.description: Recipient phone number in international format, e.g. +16505551234

tools.name: Send Media Message
tools.description: Send an image, document, video, or audio message to a WhatsApp user by public URL or uploaded media ID (subject to the same 24-hour window as text messages)

phoneNumberId.description: Business phone number ID (the WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID value)

to.description: Recipient phone number in international format, e.g. +16505551234

type.description: Media message type: image, document, video, or audio - must match the media payload field you provide

image.description: Image payload when type is image, e.g. { "link": "https://example.com/photo.png", "caption": "..." } or { "id": "<media-id>" }

document.description: Document payload when type is document, e.g. { "link": "https://example.com/invoice.pdf", "caption": "...", "filename": "invoice.pdf" }

video.description: Video payload when type is video, e.g. { "link": "https://example.com/clip.mp4", "caption": "..." }

audio.description: Audio payload when type is audio, e.g. { "link": "https://example.com/note.mp3" } (no caption support)

tools.name: Get Media URL
tools.description: Get a short-lived download URL and metadata for a media ID, e.g. to retrieve an image or document a customer sent inbound

mediaId.description: Media ID from an inbound message webhook or a media upload

phone_number_id.description: Optional business phone number ID; when set, the request fails unless the media belongs to this number

tools.name: Update Business Profile
tools.description: Update the business profile (about, address, description, email, websites, vertical) shown to customers for a business phone number

phoneNumberId.description: Business phone number ID (the WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID value)

about.description: Short status text shown under the business name

description.description: Business description shown in the profile

websites.description: Up to two website URLs, e.g. ["https://example.com"]

vertical.description: Business industry vertical, e.g. RETAIL, PROF_SERVICES, EDU, HEALTH, FINANCE, HOTEL, RESTAURANT, TRAVEL, or OTHER

tools.name: Mark Message as Read
tools.description: Mark an inbound WhatsApp message as read so the customer sees read receipts after the agent processes it

phoneNumberId.description: Business phone number ID (the WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID value)

message_id.description: WhatsApp message ID (wamid...) of the inbound message to mark as read

tools.name: Get Business Profile
tools.description: Read the business profile (about, address, email, websites) shown to customers for a business phone number

phoneNumberId.description: Business phone number ID (the WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID value)

tools.name: List Message Templates
tools.description: List the message templates on a WhatsApp Business Account so an agent can pick an approved template name and language before sending

wabaId.description: WhatsApp Business Account ID (the WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID value)

status.description: Filter by template status, e.g. APPROVED, PENDING, or REJECTED

after.description: Pagination cursor from the previous page

prompts.title: Send a follow-up
prompts.prompt: Send a WhatsApp message to a customer following up on their recent inquiry.

prompts.title: Review templates
prompts.prompt: List my approved WhatsApp message templates and summarize what each one is for.

prompts.title: Check business profile
prompts.prompt: Show my WhatsApp business profile and suggest improvements to the description and website links.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: WhatsApp Business Cloud API setup

steps.title: Create a Meta app with the WhatsApp product
steps.description: Sign in at https://developers.facebook.com (a free Meta developer account works), create a Business-type app, and add the WhatsApp product. Meta provisions a free test phone number and sandbox automatically.

steps.title: Get a test token and phone number ID
steps.description: In WhatsApp > API Setup, copy the temporary access token and the Phone number ID for the test number. Add up to 5 verified recipient numbers for sandbox testing. Set WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN and WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID.

steps.title: Note your WhatsApp Business Account ID
steps.description: The WABA ID is shown in WhatsApp > API Setup (and in Meta Business Suite). Set it as WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID if you want to list message templates.

steps.title: Create a permanent token for production
steps.description: Temporary tokens expire after about 24 hours. For production, create a System User in Meta Business Suite, grant it the whatsapp_business_messaging and whatsapp_business_management permissions, generate a non-expiring token, and use it as WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN.

notes: Free-form text messages are only delivered within 24 hours of the customer's last message; outside that window you must send an approved template.
Use the internal phone number ID in API calls, not the E.164 phone number.
New templates must be approved by Meta before they can be sent; check status with the List Message Templates tool.
